title: Stage Finding
description: A vulnerability finding produced by the auditor/hunter stage. Must pass validation before advancing to exploit.

file.description: Source file path relative to repo root

entry_point.description: How attacker input reaches this code path

confidence.description: How sure the auditor is this is exploitable

evidence.description: Structural call path and reasoning, entry → sink. Include relevant code snippets.

attacker_model.description: Who the attacker is (unauth internet, low-priv user, etc.)

subsystem.description: Which subsystem of the target this affects
